source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/250623 포터블 태국TFDA 등록 요청서류 - 이창민 팀장님/TFDA on Handheld/13. Risk Management File/Attachment 1 - Life Cycle Report 250054(Rev.1).docx

document.title: Life Cycle Report for HnX-P1, HnX-PB Portable X-ray System

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life Cycle Report for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB Portable X-ray System covering capacitor life cycle and expected service life.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product life cycle documentation by identifying the capacitor as a vulnerable component and calculating capacitor life for expected service life justification.
keyPoints: The document is the life cycle of the HnX-P1 and HnX-PB.
The selected part key is a capacitor on the inverter ass'y board at C9/C10/C14/C28/C29.
The capacitor is identified as SAMWHA(Korea) LQ Series.
The capacitor life cycle is calculated as 262438.4 h, or 29.96 years.
The Expected Service Life is stated as about 7 years, with the conclusion specifically naming HnX-P1.

concepts.name: Ripple current
concepts.evidence: Ripple current 9.82 A Ia:measured ripple current

evidence.claim: The document is a Life Cycle Report for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB Portable X-ray System.
evidence.evidenceText: Life Cycle Report for HnX-P1, HnX-PB Portable X-ray System

evidence.claim: The report number and revision are A-LCR-HNX Rev.1.
The document was prepared, reviewed, and approved on May 04, 2025.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared Han, Jimin R&D team May 04, 2025 Review Kim, Myeongseop R&D manager May 04, 2025 Approval Hur, Namkyu Quality Management Representative May 04, 2025

evidence.claim: Revision 1 dated May 04, 2025 added the variant model HnX-PB.
The document overview states that this document is the life cycle of the HnX-P1 and HnX-PB.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is life cycle of the HnX-P1 & HnX-PB

evidence.claim: The selected part key is a capacitor because the capacitor component that supplies current is identified as most vulnerable among circuit components.
evidence.evidenceText: Part key : Capacitor (Among circuit components, the capacitor component that supplies current is the most vulnerable.)

evidence.claim: The capacitor is located on the inverter ass'y board at C9/C10/C14/C28/C29.
The capacitor model is LQ Series from SAMWHA(Korea).
The capacitor rated voltage is 50 V, applying voltage is 32.8 V, capacitance is 820 uF, temperature type is 105 ℃, and endurance is 10000 h.
evidence.evidenceText: Rated Voltage 50 V Applying Voltage 32.8 V Capacitance 820 uF Tmepurature Type 105 ℃ Endurance 10000 h

evidence.claim: The calculated capacitor life is 262438.4 h, equivalent to 29.96 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Calculation life 262438.4 h Life ... 29.96 Y Calculated as 1 year = 8760h * Capacitor life cycle ≒ 29.96 years

evidence.claim: The Expected Service Life is stated as about 7 years.
The conclusion states the Expected Service Life of HnX-P1 is set to 7 years based on the selected capacitor life cycle.
evidence.evidenceText: Based on the life cycle selection of the component (capacitor) selected as above, the Expected Service Life of HnX-P1 is set to 7 years.

reviewFlags.reason: No authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text, despite the source metadata authoritySignal indicating FDA.
No standards are identified in the source text.
The document covers HnX-P1 and HnX-PB, but the conclusion specifically states Expected Service Life of HnX-P1; applicability to HnX-PB is not explicit.
Source text contains apparent OCR or transcription issues such as 'Tmepurature' and 'capaciter'.
